content: Folders larger than this size won't be uploaded.

comment.text: This text describes the size limit for folders being uploaded. It appears as a tooltip in the Uploader settings, informing users that folders exceeding this size will not be uploaded. Translators should ensure the description accurately reflects the maximum folder size limit.

usage.context:
: t("MaximumFileSize")
 }
 tooltipText={
 config.isMultipleUpload
 ? config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFoldersSizeDescription")
 : t("MaximumFilesSizeDescription")
 : config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFolderSizeDescription")
 : t("MaximumFileSizeDescription")
 }
